# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    // Protect everything except:
    // - Next.js internals
    // - public files
    // - auth endpoints/pages
    "/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|robots.txt|sitemap.xml|manifest.webmanifest|.*\\.(?:png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp|svg|ico|css|js|map|txt|xml|woff|woff2|eot|ttf|otf)$|api/auth|login|signup|public).*)",
  ],
};

const AUTH_COOKIE_PRIMARY = "auth_token";
const AUTH_COOKIE_FALLBACK = "access_token";

const LOGIN_PATH = "/login";
const UNAUTHORIZED_API_RESPONSE = () =>
  NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

function isApiRoute(pathname: string) {
  return pathname.startsWith("/api/");
}

function isAuthRoute(pathname: string) {
  return (
    pathname === "/login" ||
    pathname === "/signup" ||
    pathname.startsWith("/api/auth")
  );
}

function getToken(req: NextRequest): string | null {
  const primary = req.cookies.get(AUTH_COOKIE_PRIMARY)?.value;
  if (primary && primary.trim().length > 0) return primary;

  const fallback = req.cookies.get(AUTH_COOKIE_FALLBACK)?.value;
  if (fallback && fallback.trim().length > 0) return fallback;

  const authHeader = req.headers.get("authorization");
  if (authHeader?.toLowerCase().startsWith("bearer ")) {
    const token = authHeader.slice(7).trim();
    if (token.length > 0) return token;
  }

  return null;
}

function isTokenLikelyValid(token: string | null): boolean {
  if (!token) return false;

  // If token looks like JWT, enforce exp if present
  const parts = token.split(".");
  if (parts.length === 3) {
    try {
      const payloadJson = atob(parts[1].replace(/-/g, "+").replace(/_/g, "/"));
      const payload = JSON.parse(payloadJson) as { exp?: number };
      if (typeof payload.exp === "number") {
        const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
        if (payload.exp <= now) return false;
      }
      return true;
    } catch {
      // If decoding fails, treat as invalid JWT
      return false;
    }
  }

  // Non-JWT opaque token: only require non-empty
  return true;
}

function buildRedirectToLogin(req: NextRequest) {
  const url = req.nextUrl.clone();
  url.pathname = LOGIN_PATH;
  url.searchParams.set("next", req.nextUrl.pathname + req.nextUrl.search);
  return NextResponse.redirect(url);
}

export default function middleware(req: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname } = req.nextUrl;

  // Always allow auth routes (login/signup/auth API) through
  if (isAuthRoute(pathname)) {
    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  const token = getToken(req);
  const authenticated = isTokenLikelyValid(token);

  if (!authenticated) {
    // API: return 401, Pages: redirect to login
    if (isApiRoute(pathname)) return UNAUTHORIZED_API_RESPONSE();
    return buildRedirectToLogin(req);
  }

  // If authenticated and trying to access login/signup, redirect to app home
  if (pathname === "/login" || pathname === "/signup") {
    const url = req.nextUrl.clone();
    url.pathname = "/";
    url.search = "";
    return NextResponse.redirect(url);
  }

  // Allow request through; optionally pass user context downstream
  const res = NextResponse.next();
  res.headers.set("x-authenticated", "true");
  return res;
}
